name: The Fallen Kingdom
short_description: The kingdom is at war and you are the wizard who can save it! Get ready for a 2D isometric journey with spells, combat, bosses, an incredible soundtrack that accompanies the simple, yet epic story!
detailed_description: The Fallen Kingdom is my first published game, a 2D isometric view game with action and RPG. Get ready to encounter bullet hell-like combat, an incredible skill tree, and a simple story that drives the game as a whole. A quick game, lasting an hour depending on how much you die, but which presents surprises all the time, and its soundtrack, composed by Henrique Roque Rizzo, is epic and present during boss battles and even in normal levels.
about_the_game: The Fallen Kingdom is my first published game, a 2D isometric view game with action and RPG.
